---
title: "Art"
page-layout: full
listing:
  id: listing-gallery
  template: gallery.ejs
  contents:
    - art/*.jpg
    - art/*.png
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  categories: false
---

I generate art with AI, using several tools and services:

- Online service
  - Leonardo AI
- ComfyUI
  - Z-Image Turbo
  - Qwen Image Edit 2509
  - Seedvr2
  - Flux.1 Schnell
- Image editors
  - Gimp
  - Krita

::: {#listing-gallery}
:::
